extName.message: XApi HTTP Client - Api Testing Tool
extName.description: Extension name displayed in Chrome Web Store and extension management page

extDescription.message: Intercept, debug & replay HTTP requests. A comprehensive API client with collections and cURL support inside Chrome DevTools.

welcomeSubtitle.message: Intercept, debug, and replay API requests with professional ease.

newRequest.description: Button text for creating new request

newRequestDesc.message: Start a fresh API call from scratch

newCollection.description: Button text for creating new collection

importCurl.description: Button text for importing cURL command

clearAllDataConfirm.message: Are you sure you want to delete all collections, requests and history? This cannot be undone.
clearAllDataConfirm.description: Confirmation message when clearing all data

deleteCollectionConfirm.description: Confirmation message when deleting a collection

invalidCurl.description: Error message for invalid cURL input

saveToCollection.description: Title for save to collection dropdown

listAllTabs.description: Tooltip for list all tabs button

closeToRight.description: Context menu close to the right option

closeToLeft.description: Context menu close to the left option

noMatchingRequests.description: Message when no requests match filter

empty.description: Text shown when collection is empty

save.description: Button text for saving log as request

copyCurl.description: Button text for copying cURL command

sendRequestToSeeResponse.message: Send a request to see the response

thisRequestDoesNotHaveABody.message: This request does not have a body
thisRequestDoesNotHaveABody.description: Message when request has no body

formData.description: Option for form data body type

xWwwFormUrlencoded.description: Option for form url encoded body type

addItem.description: Button text for adding new item

noRequestsFound.description: Message when no requests are found

largeResponsePreview.description: Label shown when response body is large

showingPreview.message: Showing a preview to keep the browser responsive.
showingPreview.description: Message explaining large response preview mode

showPreview.description: Button text for showing large response preview

showFullRaw.description: Button text for rendering the full raw response body

copyResponse.description: Button text for copying the full response body

copyFailed.description: Error message when copying response body fails

mockTab.description: Sidebar tab label for mock rules

mockGlobalOn.description: Label when mock global switch is on

mockGlobalOff.description: Label when mock global switch is off

mockGlobalActive.description: Status label when the mock global switch is active

mockNewRule.description: Button text to create a new mock rule

mockListEmpty.description: Empty state for the mock list

mockListEmptyHint.message: Right-click a captured request → "Mock this" to start fast.
mockListEmptyHint.description: Hint shown in the empty mock list

mockHits.description: Label for hit count of a mock rule

mockThis.description: Context menu label to create a mock rule from a captured request

clearMockRulesConfirm.message: Clear all mock rules? This cannot be undone.
clearMockRulesConfirm.description: Confirmation message when clearing all mock rules

mockRuleEnabled.description: Toggle label to enable/disable a single mock rule

mockRuleNamePlaceholder.description: Placeholder for the rule name input

mockUrlPattern.description: Label for the URL match pattern input

mockUrlPatternPlaceholder.description: Placeholder for the URL pattern input

mockMatchMode.description: Label for the match mode segmented control

mockMethod.description: Label for the HTTP method selector

mockModeReplace.description: Mock mode option: replace entire response

mockModePatchJson.description: Mock mode option: patch fields inside the real JSON response

mockStatus.description: Label for response status code input

mockReplaceBody.description: Label for the response body textarea

mockFillFromHistory.description: Button to prefill the response body from a captured request

mockJsonPathHeader.description: Header for the JSON-patch field path column

mockJsonValueHeader.description: Header for the JSON-patch new value column

mockAddField.description: Button to add a new JSON-patch row

mockNoSample.message: No matching capture in history yet — type the path manually.
mockNoSample.description: Hint shown when there's no captured request matching the URL pattern

mockDisabledHint.message: This rule is disabled and will not affect any request.
mockDisabledHint.description: Banner shown when the current rule is disabled

mockNoPatches.message: No fields configured. Click "Add field" below to start.
mockNoPatches.description: Empty state for the JSON-patch table

mockSelectAll.description: Tooltip for the patch-table header checkbox when not all rows are enabled

mockDeselectAll.description: Tooltip for the patch-table header checkbox when all rows are enabled

jsonTreeView.description: Toggle button label for the foldable JSON tree view

jsonRawView.description: Toggle button label for the plain-text JSON view

jsonEditView.description: Toggle button label for the editable textarea (paired with the tree preview)

jsonExpandAll.description: Button to expand every node in the JSON tree

jsonCollapseAll.description: Button to collapse every node in the JSON tree

jsonTreeTooLarge.message: Tree too large to render fully — showing first nodes only.
jsonTreeTooLarge.description: Notice shown when JSON tree hits the rendering cap

systemLanguage.description: Language option that follows the browser language
